title: eriogonum acaule var. shockleyi
intro: Eriogonum acaule var. shockleyi, also known as Shockley's buckwheat, is a rare and unique plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eriogonum acaule var. shockleyi include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antiseptic properties. Traditionally, this plant has been prepared as a salve or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
